strengths: TypeScript and Node.js experience across multiple roles aligns with the core stack
React exposure at Optilyz and prior fullstack work covers frontend requirements
Long track record of shipping production systems and learning new tools
concerns: Listed as Senior/Staff-level for years — heavily overqualified for an entry-level junior/mid IC role
No PostgreSQL experience shown; database work is MongoDB, MySQL, and generic SQL
No demonstrated experience in renewable energy, construction tech, or energy-consulting domains, and Nest.js is absent from the stack

key_factors.factor: No domain exposure to energy/construction tech

response.justification: The candidate is a Staff/Senior engineer with a decade-plus track record, applying to an explicitly entry-level junior/mid fullstack position — a structural mismatch that risks rapid disengagement, salary misalignment and limited room to grow into. The required stack specifics are also weakly covered: PostgreSQL is absent (MongoDB/MySQL instead), Nest.js does not appear, and there is no exposure to the renewable-energy or building-renovation domain that the platform is built around. Only basic German is listed for a role demanding high on-site presence in a German-speaking consulting context, further weakening fit.
